translated: Seeing Liella perform in Ibaraki, the hometown of the Onitsuka sisters and myself, was one of my dreams.
So when I saw the announcement, my emotions exploded so much I almost screamed out loud at work!
Hitachi Seaside Park is a place where I have so many memories,
like going on school trips as a kid or having barbecues with my family and friends.
I'm so happy to be able to make new memories there with everyone in Liella.
I'm really looking forward to having the best time with Liella again this summer.
Next is Liella name: Takashi from Sendai. Thank you!
Congratulations on your appearance at LuckyFes!
Since it's a festival in Ibaraki, the home of the Onitsuka sisters,
I'm sure it'll feel extra special.
It's a summer festival, so please sweep the venue into a whirlwind of excitement with your hot performance!
Also, I'm looking forward to seeing if you'll perform any songs that scream "summer."
Definitely. They also said, "I'd love to hear about your enthusiasm for the festival
or if there's anything specific you're hoping to do at a summer fest!"
That's right, Liella will be appearing on Day 2 of LuckyFes, on the 9th.
It's great that it's in Ibaraki.
